04

OneCaroyroyan

Web-Based Barangay E-Service & Management Information System
for Barangay Caroyroyan, Naga City

Overview

OneCaroyroyan is a web-based barangay e-service and management information system designed to modernize and streamline operations at Barangay Caroyroyan. The system replaces manual, paper-based processes with a centralized digital platform — covering resident records, certificate generation, financial tracking, blotter management, and automated reporting for barangay officials.

Features

Resident Records Management

Centralized database for resident information — organized, searchable, and protected.

Semi-Automated Certificate Generation

Generates barangay clearances and certificates using standardized templates.

Blotter & Complaint Management

Tracks blotter entries and complaint cases with status monitoring and centralized records.

Financial Recording

Structured digital recording of cash-based transactions, payments, and receipts.

Automated Reports & Dashboards

Real-time dashboards, charts, and PDF-ready reports for barangay decision-making.

Official Correspondence Tracking

Manages and tracks official documents and external correspondence digitally.

Role-Based Access Control

Secure access for Captain, Secretary, Treasurer, Accounting Clerk, and Administrator.

Walk-In Transaction Support

Internal digital processing for all walk-in resident transactions and requests.

My Role

As one of the lead proponents and UI/UX designer, I contributed to system design, user flow mapping, and interface prototyping. My focus was on creating an intuitive experience for barangay staff across multiple roles — ensuring each module was easy to navigate, visually consistent, and aligned with actual barangay workflows.

Research Team
Mary Ann S. Lumbria John Michael V. Mujar Mary Joy C. Basiño
View Prototype Read Proposal
01

DriftService Pro

Web-Based Operations Management & Financial Monitoring System
for Custoworks Car Wash & Detailing

Overview

DriftService Pro replaces manual tracking at a car wash & detailing shop with a centralized digital platform. It covers everything from customer bookings and smart POS to real-time job tracking and financial reporting — designed to work for all four user types: admin, cashier, staff, and customer.

Features

Online Booking & Scheduling

Reduces booking conflicts and optimizes time slots for staff and customers.

Smart POS System

Automates service selection, dynamic pricing, and payment processing.

QR Code Job Tracking

Customers scan a QR to monitor their vehicle's service status in real time.

Inventory with Auto Deduction

Tracks supplies and auto-deducts stock each time a service is completed.

Dashboard Analytics

Visual revenue trends, service mix charts, active bookings, and daily summaries.

Staff & Commission Monitoring

Tracks individual staff performance and automates commission computation.

Financial Reports

Logs sales and expenses, generates business reports for owner decision-making.

Real-Time Notifications

Instant alerts to staff and customers on bookings, updates, and completions.

My Role

I led the UI/UX design — from wireframes and user flow mapping to the final high-fidelity prototype in Figma. My focus was on building an interface that works intuitively across all four user roles while maintaining a consistent, professional visual system throughout every module.

Research Team
Mary Ann S. Lumbria John Michael V. Mujar Mary Joy C. Basiño
View Prototype Read Proposal
03

SmartStock

Web-Based Inventory, Sales & Finance Management Information System
for Salak Sari-Sari Store

Overview

SmartStock replaces Salak Sari-Sari Store’s manual record-keeping with a centralized web-based system for inventory, sales, and expenses. It reduces errors and time spent during inventory updates, and provides dashboard summaries, reports, charts, and low-stock / near-expiry alerts for data-driven decisions.

Features

User Login System

Secure login, credential verification, and logout.

Inventory Management

Manage products (add/edit/delete/search), category, price, and stock quantity.

Sales Recording

Record transactions with automatic totals and stock deduction.

Expense Management

Categorize expenses and track financial performance.

Stock & Expiry Alerts

Low-stock and near-expiry notifications on the dashboard.

Reports, Charts & Analytics

Sales reports, profit summaries, trends, and product performance.

My Role

As one of the project proponents, I contributed to the proposal and system planning: requirements gathering, defining the Inventory/Sales/Finance modules, and outlining the dashboard, reports, and alerts based on the store’s manual workflow.

Research Team
